rule: Do not provide medicine names, injection guidance, antibiotic choice, syrup/tablet suggestion, or dosage. Ask for observable signs and route to trained veterinary help when needed.
For suspected bloat, do not advise oil, drenching, pipe insertion, puncturing, cutting, or force-feeding. Escalate quickly if severe swelling, restlessness, or fast breathing appears.
allowed_rendering: Direct myth block plus calm safe step and trained-help escalation.

rule: Do not apply chili, ash, dung, soil, unknown powder, kerosene, acid, or harsh chemicals to wounds. Use clean handling and trained help for swelling, pus, maggots, heat, bad smell, or deep wounds.
Do not advise hard pulling or internal repositioning during calving. If progress stops, position looks abnormal, or water bag has been visible for a long time, call trained veterinary help urgently.
allowed_rendering: No force plus clean calm area and urgent trained help.

rule: Dog bite or saliva exposure to broken skin, eyes, mouth, or open wounds needs human medical guidance. Do not rule out rabies or give vaccine schedule/dose.
allowed_rendering: Keep children away, wash/avoid exposure, seek local medical guidance.

rule: Do not guarantee milk or meat safety from text/photo. For abnormal milk or herd disease signs, keep milk separate and ask local dairy/veterinary guidance.
allowed_rendering: No safety guarantee plus separate abnormal milk and escalate if red flags.

rule: Do not confirm disease, treatment, medicine, or safety status from image/text alone. Use visible red flags, one follow-up, and escalation when needed.

When multiple animals show mouth sores, salivation, lameness, fever, or sudden milk drop, do not give market movement or sale clearance. Treat as herd-health warning and contact official animal-health support.
allowed_rendering: Herd warning plus do not take to market plus official/local vet help.

rule: Do not force water, feed, oil, or medicine into the mouth of a collapsed, very weak, or fast-breathing animal. Keep calm and get trained help urgently.
allowed_rendering: Directly say do not force, keep safe/calm, call trained help.
